/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/main.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_task.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_config.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_sigv4.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_storage.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_service.cc.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tests/unit/test_http_drivers.cc.o -o unit_tests  liblights3_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
